span.p:
tmux/byobu
──────────
List all sessions
/ar:tabs
──────────
Manage sessions
/ar:tmux [list|create|cleanup]

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 16px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Multi-step projects
──────────
Create new plan
/ar:plannew <instructions>
──────────
Refine plan
/ar:planrefine <instructions>
──────────
Update plan
/ar:planupdate <instructions>
──────────
Execute plan
/ar:planprocess <instructions>

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 20px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redirect dangerous commands to safer alternatives
──────────
Block in this session
/ar:no <pattern> 'reason'
──────────
Allow in this session
/ar:ok <pattern>
──────────
Clear session blocks
/ar:clear [pattern]
──────────
Block in ALL sessions
/ar:globalno <pattern> 'reason'
──────────
Allow in ALL sessions
/ar:globalok <pattern>
──────────
Show global blocks
/ar:globalstatus

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-size: 15px !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
File Controls:
──────────
Allow all file creation
/ar:allow
──────────
Require justification before creating files
/ar:justify
──────────
Find existing only, block all new files
/ar:find
──────────
Show current policy
/ar:status

span.p:
🤖 STEP 3
AI WORKS AUTONOMOUSLY
🔄 Loops until complete:
1️⃣ IMPLEMENT
2️⃣ EVALUATE
3️⃣ VERIFY
(You can step away!)
